verifiableClaims.name: Delegated Access (Identity + Delegation)
verifiableClaims.purpose: Verify delegated authority — identity credential plus delegation credential

definition.purpose: Verify delegated access authority for a child or other dependent

input_descriptors.name: Identity Credential
input_descriptors.purpose: Proof of identity for the person on whose behalf access is being delegated

input_descriptors.name: Delegation Credential
input_descriptors.purpose: Authorization to act on behalf of another person

fields.purpose: Delegation subject with DID reference to identity credential
